string.text: I'm truly happy to see you again. This time, please let me stay by your side. I'll make sure I protect you.
I'm glad to see you too, Helen.
You're here. Do you need anything from me? Feel free to ask.
Helen, how come you're so supportive towards me?
Everyone's counting on you, but who can you count on... Commander, I want to be a source of strength for you. If you're tired, you can rest by my side, and I'll tell you interesting bedtime stories.
Can you come with me, Helen?
I feel so happy now that I can stay by your side. No matter where you decide to go, the place where you are is my "home".
Okay Helen, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
If you want it, I'll do it for you.
